system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Liam Khan. I have an upcoming flight from Houston (IAH) to Seattle (SEA) on May 23rd, and I’d like to push it back to May 24th instead. Also, I want to upgrade my ticket to business class for all passengers on that flight. Can you help me with that?

Thank you, Liam. To assist you with modifying your flight and upgrading to business class, I need your user ID and the reservation ID for this booking. If you don’t know your reservation ID, I can help locate it once I have your user ID. Could you please provide your user ID?
Sure, my user ID is liam_khan_2521. I don’t have the reservation ID handy, so please go ahead and look it up with my user ID.
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. To proceed, I need your reservation ID. If you have any confirmation email or document with the reservation ID, please provide it. If not, I recommend contacting a human agent for further assistance.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for help with your request?
I don’t have the reservation ID with me right now, unfortunately. If you’re unable to pull it up with my user ID, then yes, please transfer me to a human agent who can help me with this. Thank you.

arguments.summary: User Liam Khan wants to change his flight from Houston (IAH) to Seattle (SEA) from May 23rd to May 24th and upgrade all passengers to business class, but does not have the reservation ID. Needs assistance locating the reservation and processing the changes.

messages.content: Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I am unable to transfer you to a human agent due to a technical issue at the moment. I recommend reaching out directly to customer support through phone or email for immediate assistance with your reservation.

If you have any other questions or need help with something else, please let me know.

That’s really disappointing—I was hoping to get this sorted out now. Is there absolutely no way you can look up my reservation using my name and user ID? I just want to change my flight date and upgrade to business class. If you can’t help with that, can you at least tell me what information I’ll need to have ready when I contact customer support directly, so I don’t run into the same issue again?

I understand your frustration, Liam, and I apologize for the inconvenience. At this time, I am unable to access your reservation using just your name and user ID due to a technical issue. Normally, I would be able to look up your reservation with your user ID, but this function is currently unavailable.

When you contact customer support directly, please have the following information ready to help them locate your reservation and process your request efficiently:

1. Your full name (as it appears on the reservation)
2. Your user ID (liam_khan_2521)
3. The email address associated with your account
4. The flight details (origin: Houston (IAH), destination: Seattle (SEA), original date: May 23rd)
5. Any confirmation email or booking reference number, if available
6. The names and dates of birth of all passengers on the reservation

This information will help the agent quickly locate your booking and assist with changing your flight date and upgrading to business class.

If you have any other questions or need guidance, please let me know.

Thank you for letting me know what I’ll need. I’ll gather all that information before I call in. I really hope the technical issue gets resolved soon—it would be much easier to handle this online. If there’s any update or if you’re able to assist me in the future, please let me know. Otherwise, I’ll reach out to customer support directly. Thanks for your help.

You're very welcome, Liam. I appreciate your understanding and patience. If the technical issue is resolved and I’m able to assist you online in the future, I’ll be happy to help you with your reservation changes.

For now, gathering the information I listed will make your call to customer support much smoother. If you have any other questions or need assistance with anything else, please feel free to reach out.

Thank you for your understanding, and safe travels!
Thank you. I’ll keep an eye out in case the system is back up, and I’ll reach out again if I need anything else. Have a good day!
Thank you, Liam! If you need anything else in the future, feel free to reach out. Wishing you a great day and a smooth travel experience!
Thanks, I appreciate it! Have a great day as well.
You're welcome, Liam! Thank you for your kind words. Have a wonderful day and safe travels!
Thank you! Take care.
Thank you, Liam! Take care as well. If you need assistance in the future, I’m here to help. Safe travels!
Thanks! I’ll reach out if I need anything else. Have a good one!
Thank you, Liam! I’ll be here if you need anything else. Have a great day!
Thank you! Have a great day too.
Thank you, Liam! Wishing you a fantastic day ahead. If you need any assistance in the future, just let me know!
Will do! Thanks again. Have a fantastic day!
Thank you, Liam! You too—have a fantastic day! If you need anything, just reach out. Safe travels!
Thank you so much! I appreciate it. Take care!
You're very welcome, Liam! I appreciate your kindness. Take care and safe travels!
Thank you! I appreciate your help. Take care!
You're welcome, Liam! I'm glad I could assist. Take care, and have a wonderful day!
Thank you! Wishing you a wonderful day as well.
Thank you, Liam! Wishing you a wonderful day too. If you need anything in the future, I’m here to help. Safe travels!
Thanks! I’ll keep that in mind. Have a great day!
Thank you, Liam! Have a great day as well. If you need anything, just reach out. Safe travels!
Thank you! I appreciate it. Take care!
You're welcome, Liam! Take care and have a fantastic day. If you need help in the future, I'm here for you!
Thank you so much! I’ll reach out if I need anything else. Have a fantastic day!
Thank you, Liam! I’m always here if you need anything. Have a fantastic day and safe travels!
Thanks, I appreciate it! Wishing you a great day and safe travels as well.
